summary: Testing iteration 8 - Update mode. Frontend features verified: compound count up/down caret buttons, CRM Signals tab with New Signal button (showing signal types: 10x_action, revenue, wormhole), determination slider always visible with motivational quote, social link helpers (openSocialLink, openPhone, openEmail). CRITICAL BUG: Backend POST /api/signals does not save signal_type field - the field is accepted but not stored in the database.

critical.issue: signal_type field is NOT saved when creating a signal. SignalInput model has signal_type field but create_signal endpoint does not include it in the signal document being saved to database (line 1607-1618 in server.py). The field should be added: 'signal_type': input_data.signal_type,
critical.fix: Add 'signal_type': input_data.signal_type or 'signal_type': '10x_action', to the signal dict

minor.issue: engagement_strength field not being persisted on update (pre-existing)
planned_ahead bonus not being calculated correctly (pre-existing)
Creating top 10x action returns 400 - duplicate check may be date format issue (pre-existing)

issues: Console warning: shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow. (non-blocking)

compound_count_carets.notes: Up/down caret buttons working correctly, updates compound_count via API

signal_types_constant.notes: SIGNAL_TYPES constant defined with correct values and colors

crm_signals_tab.notes: Signals tab is now default in CRM, shows New Signal button with signal type options

social_link_helpers.notes: Email has subject 'Connecting from the 10xUNICORN community'

determination_slider.notes: Always visible with motivational quote, no collapse behavior

signal_type_backend.notes: CRITICAL: signal_type field is not being saved to database

backend_tests_iteration8.note: 6 failures are due to signal_type backend bug

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix POST /api/signals to save signal_type field - add 'signal_type': input_data.signal_type to signal dict in server.py line 1607-1618
Pre-existing: Fix engagement_strength not being persisted in wormhole contact update
Pre-existing: Fix planned_ahead bonus calculation in signal completion
Pre-existing: Fix top 10x action creation - date format mismatch in duplicate check

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 update mode testing complete. All frontend features pass - compound count carets, CRM Signals tab, signal types UI, social link helpers, determination slider always visible. CRITICAL BACKEND BUG: signal_type field not saved on POST /api/signals. The fix is simple: add 'signal_type': input_data.signal_type to the signal dict at line 1607 in server.py. After fix, 6 tests should pass.
rca_of_issue:
Bug Location: /app/backend/server.py line 1607-1618
Root Cause: SignalInput model has signal_type field (line 356) with default '10x_action', but the create_signal function does not include this field when building the signal document to insert into MongoDB.
Reproduction: POST /api/signals with {name: 'test', signal_type: 'revenue'} returns the signal but signal_type is None.
Mitigation: Add 'signal_type': input_data.signal_type or 'signal_type': input_data.signal_type or '10x_action', to the signal dict.
